name: Corn Dance Carrot Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Red or green bell pepper; halved, seeded & sliced
15oz Black, red, kidney or pinto beans; drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the carrots and cut into narrow, short sticks.
2. Remove the husks from the corn and with a large knife, cut the raw kernels from the cob.
3. Hold the sage leaves together in a clump and finely slice crosswise to get a measure of 1/4 cup, packed.
4. Combine the carrots, corn, sage, bell pepper and chili flakes in a bowl.
5. For the dressing, combine the oil, vinegar, sugar, thyme, rosemary and pepper in a jar. Shake well.
6. Toss the beans with 2 tablespoons dressing.
7. Toss the remaining dressing with the carrot salad.
8. Spoon the carrot salad into the center of the dinner plates with the bean salad alongside.
9. Trim each plate with a few green or sage leaves.
